mentions.note: Not Cramer's favorite here; prefers higher-yielding midstream names instead.
Liquified natural gas; clean energy play with good fundamentals.
LNG liquified natural gas play; energy transition exposure; strong diversification element.

Cleanest, most established pure-play LNG exporter. 19.4B of 20B revenue from LNG. Two major facilities (Sabine, Corpus Christi). Trading all-time highs, +45% YTD, 20x 2026E. Entry point for cautious investors seeking direct LNG exposure.
American LNG provider; prefer over Expand Energy (EXE); strong position in natural gas-to-LNG value chain; industry hot.
America's edge on natural gas globally; pulled back ~20% past month on peace concerns; $11 level right; still up huge YTD.
